
```{r}
library(readr)
library(glmnet)
library(grpreg)
library(rsample)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r}
fuels_data <- read_csv("fuels_data.csv", col_types = cols(site = col_factor()))
head(fuels_data)
```

```{r}
## training and testing data
set.seed(230)
split_data <- initial_split(fuels_data, prop = 0.75, strata = site)
train_data <- training(split_data)
test_data <- testing(split_data)
```

```{r}
fit_model <- function(train_df, test_df, model_type, y_transform) {
  
  # create model matrices 
  x_train <- model.matrix(fuel_load_Mg_ha ~ ., data = train_df)[,-1]
  x_test <- model.matrix(fuel_load_Mg_ha ~ ., data = test_df)[,-1]
  
  y_train_orig <- train_df$fuel_load_Mg_ha
  y_test_orig <- test_df$fuel_load_Mg_ha
  
  if(y_transform == "none") {
    
    y_train <- train_df$fuel_load_Mg_ha
    
  } else if(y_transform == "log") {
    
    y_train <- log(train_df$fuel_load_Mg_ha)
    
  } else if(y_transform == "sqrt") {
    
    y_train <- sqrt(train_df$fuel_load_Mg_ha)
    
  }
  
  if(model_type == "ridge") {
    
    # ridge regression with cross-validation 
    cv_fit <- cv.glmnet(x = x_train, y = y_train, alpha = 0, type.measure = "mse", standardize = TRUE)
    
    # test and train set predictions 
    y_hat_train_1 <- as.numeric(predict(cv_fit, newx = x_train, s = "lambda.min"))
    y_hat_test_1 <- as.numeric(predict(cv_fit, newx = x_test, s = "lambda.min"))
    
  } else if (model_type == "lasso") {

    # lasso regression with cross-validation 
    group <- c(rep(1, 5), seq_len(ncol(x_train) - 5) + 1)
    cv_fit <- cv.grpreg(X = x_train, y = y_train, group = group, penalty = "grLasso")
    coefs <- coef(cv_fit, lambda = cv_fit$lambda.min)
    nonzero_coef_names <- setdiff(names(coefs)[coefs != 0], "(Intercept)")

    # test and train set predictions 
    y_hat_train_1 <- as.numeric(predict(cv_fit, X = x_train, lambda = cv_fit$lambda.min))
    y_hat_test_1 <- as.numeric(predict(cv_fit, X = x_test, lambda = cv_fit$lambda.min))
    
  }

  if(y_transform == "none") {
    
    y_hat_train_2 <- y_hat_train_1
    y_hat_test_2 <- y_hat_test_1
    
  } else if(y_transform == "log") {
    
    y_hat_train_2 <- exp(y_hat_train_1)
    y_hat_test_2 <- exp(y_hat_test_1)
    
  } else if(y_transform == "sqrt") {
    
    y_hat_train_2 <- y_hat_train_1^2
    y_hat_test_2 <- y_hat_test_1^2
    
  }
  
  # test-set performance (always in original units)
  rmse <- sqrt(mean((y_test_orig - y_hat_test_2)^2))
  
  rss <- sum((y_test_orig - y_hat_test_2)^2)
  tss <- sum((y_test_orig - mean(y_test_orig))^2)
  r2 <- (1-(rss/tss))

  # diagnostic plots
  resid_plot_df <- data.frame(
    y = y_train,
    y_hat = y_hat_train_1,
    resid = y_train - y_hat_train_1
  )
  
  fitted_plot_df <- data.frame(
    y_orig = y_test_orig,
    y_hat_orig = y_hat_test_2
  )

  resid_plot <- ggplot(resid_plot_df, aes(x = y_hat, y = resid)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey40", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_smooth(se = FALSE, color = "brown3") + 
    labs(title = "(a) Residual Plot",
         x = "Predicted value",
         y = "Residual") +
    theme_minimal() + 
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
  
  fitted_line_plot <- ggplot(fitted_plot_df, aes(x = y_orig, y = y_hat_orig)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") + 
        labs(title = "(b) Fitted Line Plot for Test Set",
         x = "Measured value",
         y = "Predicted value") +
    theme_minimal() + 
    theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) + 
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(-20, 300)) + 
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-20, 300))
  
  diag_plots <- resid_plot + fitted_line_plot
  
  if(model_type == "ridge") {
    
    return(list(RMSE = rmse, R2 = r2, diagnostics = diag_plots))
    
  } else if (model_type == "lasso") {
    
    return(list(RMSE = rmse, R2 = r2, diagnostics = diag_plots, selected_coefs = nonzero_coef_names))
    
  }
  
}
```

```{r}
ridge_none <- fit_model(train_df = train_data, test_df = test_data, model_type = "ridge", y_transform = "none")
ridge_none$RMSE
ridge_none$R2

dpi <- 600
png(file = "report_figs/ridge_none.png", width = 12*dpi, height = 4*dpi, res = dpi)
ridge_none$diagnostics
dev.off()
```

```{r}
ridge_sqrt <- fit_model(train_df = train_data, test_df = test_data, model_type = "ridge", y_transform = "sqrt")
ridge_sqrt$RMSE
ridge_sqrt$R2

dpi <- 600
png(file = "report_figs/ridge_sqrt.png", width = 12*dpi, height = 4*dpi, res = dpi)
ridge_sqrt$diagnostics
dev.off()
```

```{r}
ridge_log <- fit_model(train_df = train_data, test_df = test_data, model_type = "ridge", y_transform = "log")
ridge_log$RMSE
ridge_log$R2

dpi <- 600
png(file = "report_figs/ridge_log.png", width = 12*dpi, height = 4*dpi, res = dpi)
ridge_log$diagnostics
dev.off()
```

```{r}
lasso_none <- fit_model(train_df = train_data, test_df = test_data, model_type = "lasso", y_transform = "none")
lasso_none$RMSE
lasso_none$R2

dpi <- 600
png(file = "report_figs/lasso_none.png", width = 12*dpi, height = 4*dpi, res = dpi)
lasso_none$diagnostics
dev.off()
```

```{r}
lasso_sqrt <- fit_model(train_df = train_data, test_df = test_data, model_type = "lasso", y_transform = "sqrt")
lasso_sqrt$RMSE
lasso_sqrt$R2

dpi <- 600
png(file = "report_figs/lasso_sqrt.png", width = 12*dpi, height = 4*dpi, res = dpi)
lasso_sqrt$diagnostics
dev.off()
```

```{r}
lasso_log <- fit_model(train_df = train_data, test_df = test_data, model_type = "lasso", y_transform = "log")
lasso_log$RMSE
lasso_log$R2

dpi <- 600
png(file = "report_figs/lasso_log.png", width = 12*dpi, height = 4*dpi, res = dpi)
lasso_log$diagnostics
dev.off()
```
